title: Execution Mode Schema
description: Defines the execution mode configuration for running optimization sessions

ExecutionMode.description:
Execution mode for the optimization session:
- edge_analytics: Client-side orchestration (grid, random algorithms). Non-sensitive telemetry syncs to backend when available.
- hybrid: Client-side execution with smart algorithm (Optuna-based). Backend provides next-trial suggestions.
- hybrid_api: External API-based optimization. Trials execute via HTTP endpoints implementing the Traigent API contract.

HybridConfiguration.description: Optional configuration for hybrid execution mode (auto-detected from session config when absent)

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for hybrid execution

optimizer_endpoint.description: Direct endpoint URL for optimizer access

batch_size.description: Number of metrics to batch before submission

retry_attempts.description: Number of retry attempts for failed submissions

HybridApiConfiguration.description: Configuration for hybrid_api execution mode — required when execution_mode is hybrid_api

endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint implementing the Traigent Hybrid Mode API contract

transport.description: Transport protocol for the external service

auth_token.description: Bearer token for the external service (stored as a secret reference)

execution_mode.description: The execution mode for this configuration

experiment_id.description: Reference to the experiment using this execution mode

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this configuration was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification
